seo.title: Scheme Assistant — Find government schemes in India
seo.description: Search thousands of government schemes, use filters for state, age, income and more, and read scheme details. Guidance only — always confirm on official government websites.

auth.title: Account
auth.leadSingle: Google handles both new and returning users — one button is enough. Continue with Google to save your session on this device.
auth.finePrint: Sign-in uses Google Identity Services. For production, verify the ID token on your server and store sessions securely.
auth.missingClient: Add VITE_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID to a .env file (see .env.example), restart the dev server, and add this site’s origin in Google Cloud Console → Credentials → your OAuth client.
auth.googleError: Google sign-in failed. Confirm this site’s URL is under Authorized JavaScript origins in Google Cloud Console, then restart the dev server.

layout.footerNote: Guidance on government schemes — always verify details on official sources.
layout.translatorLoading: Loading Hindi translation model (first visit may download ~30MB)…

home.title: What can we help you find?
home.tagline: Search thousands of schemes — instant results below.
home.searchModesHint: Type below, tap a topic (it fills the search box), or use the microphone.
home.voiceUnsupported: Voice search is not supported in this browser. Try Chrome or Edge.
home.popularTopicsHint: Each topic switches the filters below to match that area (they combine with search using AND).
home.filtersIntro: Pick one or more dropdowns — they combine together (AND). Add a keyword search for even tighter results. Gender and age use wording in the scheme text where the CSV has no dedicated column.
home.loadingText: Fetching scheme records — usually just a moment.
home.readyText: {{count}} schemes indexed. Use the filters above and/or type at least {{min}} characters in search — results show here. Open a card for full details.
home.noMatchText: Loosen filters or try different options. If everything is very strict, clear all filters and start again.

pension.label: Pension & seniors
pension.hint: Old age, retirement, pension wording in schemes

income.label: Income & limits
income.hint: BPL/EWS keywords, or lakh ranges parsed from scheme text (approximate)

intro.Agriculture: These filters target agriculture, PM-KISAN, MGNREGA-style wording in the dataset. State still applies first.
intro.Health: These filters target coverage, insurance, and hospital-related benefits in scheme text.
intro.Education: These filters target scholarships, fees, and school or college support in the text.
intro.Housing: These filters target PMAY, subsidies, loans, and home-related benefits — not generic pension filters.
intro.Women: Gender and related benefits are emphasised; combine with state for local schemes.
intro.Student: Student age bands and scholarships are emphasised; add a keyword if you need a specific course.

about.title: About
about.lead: Scheme Assistant helps you understand government schemes in plain language and discover options that may be relevant for you.
about.li2: Surface relevant schemes through search and filters
about.li3: Offer quick answers via the chatbot (demo — you can connect AI later)
about.disclaimer: This tool is for guidance only. Always confirm final eligibility, documents, and how to apply on official government portals or through official helplines.

features.title: Features
features.lead: What works today and what you can add next — all in one overview.

f1.title: Smart search
f1.desc: Find schemes by keyword and category — live on the Home page.

f2.title: Chatbot
f2.desc: Ask questions in natural language; connect real AI / RAG later.

f3.title: Eligibility checker
f3.desc: Filter by age, income, or state — placeholder for your own rules.

f4.title: Alerts
f4.desc: Notifications for new schemes or deadlines — future feature.

f5.title: Community Q&A
f5.desc: Share experiences and tips — add with moderation when ready.

f6.title: Guides
f6.desc: Step-by-step PDFs or articles on how to apply.

chatbot.title: Chatbot
chatbot.lead: Demo replies — connect your API here in production.
chatbot.welcome: Hi! Ask anything about schemes — I will share basic guidance (demo).
chatbot.r_empty: Type a message and send it — I can help with basic information about schemes (demo).
chatbot.r_pmKisan: PM-KISAN provides direct support to eligible farmer families. Official site: pmkisan.gov.in — use it for registration and status checks.
chatbot.r_health: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY offers cashless treatment coverage for eligible families. See pmjay.gov.in for your card and eligibility.
chatbot.r_housing: PMAY has separate tracks for urban and rural beneficiaries. Check pmaymis.gov.in and pmayg.nic.in depending on your area.
chatbot.r_greeting: Hi — I am Scheme Assistant. Ask for a scheme name or topic, for example health, farmers, or housing.
chatbot.r_apply: Each scheme uses its own official portal. Find a scheme on Home, then open its government website — you will see how to apply and which documents are needed.
chatbot.r_default: I am in demo mode. Search schemes on Home, or try keywords like PM-KISAN, health, or housing. Later you can plug in a real AI API here.

modal.dataNote: Scheme text below is from the dataset (often English).
modal.dataNoteHi: Content below is machine-translated into Hindi from the dataset (usually English). Always verify important details on official portals.
